subject: Bangladesh garment exports face new 15% tariff
claim_text: New 15% tariff on garment and fabric exports from Bangladesh signed into law.

subject: Bangladesh textiles investigation launched
claim_text: USTR launched formal investigation into Bangladeshi textile trade practices.

subject: 37% tariff on Bangladeshi textile imports
claim_text: Trade officials announced a 37% tariff on Bangladeshi textile and clothing imports.
